title: 2026 Garden Kickoff
body:
Alright, here's the plan everyone. We'll add to it as we go, but you've got to start somewhere.

Plans are useless, planning is essential.

# Vision

This summer, we want our garden to feel calm, open, and enjoyable.

- A simple, peaceful, and welcoming garden
- A spot where we can sit outside and watch airplanes fly overhead
- A good open view of the sky
- Heirloom tomatoes
- Herbs
- Maintain current perennial beds, trees, shrubs, and grasses
- An assortment of annual flowers. Foxgloves and Snapdragons for fun
- A trumpet flower on the trellis
- Start 1 or 2 more bonsai

Overall, we want the garden to be a place to relax, look up, and enjoy a mix of food, flowers, and a few longer-term projects.

_Pictured: Crocus and Daffodil bulbs starting to poke through_
